vocab.api: Rails API mode. resources :items in routes.rb. Respond with render json: @item, status: :ok. Namespace under api/v1.
vocab.database: ActiveRecord ORM. includes(:association) for eager loading. scope for reusable query chains. add_index migration for performance.
vocab.authentication: Devise gem. JWT API auth with devise-jwt. before_action :authenticate_user! to protect controllers.
vocab.search: ransack gem: @q = Model.ransack(params[:q]). pg_search for PostgreSQL full-text. Pagy for pagination.
vocab.background: Sidekiq with Redis. Class inherits ApplicationJob (ActiveJob). perform_later for async, perform_now for sync.
